brief_notes: Excellent eLife-style paper. All numbers verified: N=40, 0.23 mg/kg, 0.58 mg/kg/hr, 718 parcels, 42.1%, 14.1%, 10.4%, 12.8+-0.7, 8.7+-0.3, 8.6+-0.3, F(2,60)=564, SST r=0.47, PVALB r=-0.22, 41.1%, 29%/12%, r=0.7, PANSS 0.69/0.93/0.89, subject-level stats. Named citations throughout. Well-structured with clear contribution statement.
